subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting! Thy letter was received, and thy sorrows caused profound grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المهیمن القیوم مکتوب شما وصول یافت و احزان شما سبب تاثر شدید گشت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
